# Bluesky vs Twitter/X vs Threads for B2B Community Building in 2026

## Summary

Comprehensive platform comparison for B2B community building with quantitative data. Key finding: each platform has fundamentally different algorithm mechanics, audience concentration, and engagement characteristics that make "be everywhere" strategies ineffective. Bluesky delivers 2.8x higher engagement than Twitter/X but has 1/66th the reach. Twitter/X has the largest B2B audience but declining organic reach (non-Premium accounts see 60% less reach than verified accounts). Threads prioritizes visual content and underperforms for technical/dense content.

## Key quotations / statistics

- **Active users (Q2 2025):** Bluesky 6M | Twitter/X 400M+ | Threads 275M
- **Engagement rate (avg):** Bluesky 4.2% | Twitter/X 1.5% | Threads 2.1%
- **Bluesky:** "2.8× higher engagement rates than Twitter/X"
- **Twitter/X algorithm:** "Non-Premium accounts see 60% less reach than verified accounts with identical follower counts (Stanford Internet Observatory, 2025)"
- **LinkedIn:** "Fastest-growing engagement platform. LinkedIn ER has grown from 2.22% in 2024 to 2.94% in 2026, fueled by the platform's push into creator tools and newsletters."
- **Threads:** "Educational content (how-tos, listicles) with visual aids drove 5× more saves than text-based thought leadership (Meta, Threads Creator Report Q1 2025)"
- **Twitter/X link suppression:** "External links reduce reach by 30-50%"
- **Bluesky feed:** "Chronological default, optional feeds" — no opaque algorithmic ranking
- "Bluesky delivers 2.8× engagement but 1/66th the reach of Twitter/X — trade scale for depth"
- "Twitter/X remains essential for industry visibility but organic growth requires Premium ($8-16/mo)"
- "Focus 60% effort on one primary platform rather than spreading thin across all three"

## Platform algorithm summary table

| Dimension | Bluesky | Twitter/X | Threads |
|---|---|---|---|
| Feed algorithm | Chronological default | For You (algorithmic) | Algorithmic (Instagram-derived) |
| Engagement rate | 4.2% | 1.5% | 2.1% |
| Link sharing | Native, no penalties | Suppressed 30-50% | Limited visibility |
| Best for B2B | Dev tools, open-source, tech | General B2B, news, thought leadership | Visual B2B (design, productivity) |

## Annotations for stinger-forge

- **Critical for `guides/02-platform-selection.md`:** This table is the core data for the platform-fit rubric. Use the engagement rates, algorithm descriptions, and B2B suitability notes verbatim or paraphrased.
- **For `guides/06-content-calendar.md`:** The link suppression finding for Twitter/X means the calendar template must account for links being placed in first comments (not the post body) on that platform.
- **For `guides/07-growth-benchmarks.md`:** These engagement rates are 2025 data — note the recency limitation and use alongside 2026 SociaVault data.
- **Open question answered:** Partially answers "Bluesky algorithm evolution in 2026." Bluesky's chronological-default feed and custom algorithmic feeds (not opaque ranking) mean early-adopter advantage is real because smaller active community = more visibility per post. Check for more 2026-specific Bluesky data.
